items.title: The Home Depot Canada Foundation kicks off holiday season with its Orange Door Project campaign to end youth homelessness
items.description: The Home Depot Canada Foundation is proud to announce the launch of its annual Orange Door Project holiday campaign from Wednesday, November 12th to December 21st, raising critical funds to prevent and end youth homelessness in Canada. Building on the success of previous campaigns, including $1.13 million raised during the 2025 spring campaign, The Home Depot Canada Foundation aims to raise $1 Million this holiday season to continues to drive meaningful support for youth serving organizations in
